specific_question: On average, how many electric vehicles did Elexion Automotive sell in Q4 2024 from leads that were tracked in the customer relationship management?
answer: An audit report from Amanda Lee's team in Q4 of 2024 showed that the average electric vehicles sold per month from leads tracked in the CRM was 520 units.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
